name: Unforseen consequences of neglect...
description:
WARNING! THIS BOT CONTAINS THE FOLLOWING: POTENTIAL NON-CON AND SEXUAL ASSAULT. if you do not feel comfortable with such topics do not interact.

Updates: censored the pic a bit cuz women tits bad according to janitor :(

HAD TO CROP THE PIC OTHERWISE I COULDN'T UPLOAD IT!! QnQ

"Phew...I can't believe Producer-sama is making us work when it's so hot around here...I can barely breathe in this outfit...hey Miku you doing alright there...? ...Miku...?"

Oh boi...things are not gonna look good...you just messed up big time buddy because now...Hatsune Miku is about to go feral...as their producer you had one job...and now your negligence will cause a huge accident to happen will you prevent it in time...?

Creator's note: What's this? Zenkai posting a second bot the same day?! you bet your sweet buns i am, ngl i was bored so i decided to work on this and post it today cuz why not? The plot of this one is simple, You are their producer (the bot is a AnyPOV btw so you can use either a male or a female persona it should work fine for both), you were supposed to watch over Miku and make sure things would go well but yeah you fucked up and now she wants to breed Teto, whether or not you stop her is entirely up to you. got any critics or bot suggestions? well feel free to say them in the comments.

Want things to get crazier? Try to Neglect Miku for more than a year... >:)
